title: Next-research-track selection plan revision: L1 epistemic discount applied to T1/T2/T3 K9-reachability estimates (PLAN_ONLY; no build/exec/fetch authorized)
report_kind: Sealed PLAN-only revision/comparison memo that applies the L1 epistemic discount (2x and 3x) from s12-d1 P11 PARK lessons to the T1/T2/T3 K9-reachability estimates in 0e3f9d4, requires source disclosure for T1's 50-65 trades/year estimate, re-scores T1/T2/T3 under conservative-discount scenarios, and presents the honest analytical recommendation including an explicit halt/pivot option. No code, no build, no execution, no data fetch, no signal computation.
operator_authorization_phrase: Authorize a PLAN-only revision/comparison memo for 0e3f9d4

status_evidence: 0e3f9d4 §0 opener: 'Status: PLAN_ONLY (no code written, no spec sealed, no data fetched, no signal computation, no backtest by this plan; the next step is a separate operator authorization to author a Tier-N specification plan for the selected track).'
0e3f9d4 §10 HARD BOUNDARIES: 'PLAN only. No DRAFT. No SEAL. No code. No backtest. No simulator. No signal computation. No data fetch.'
0e3f9d4 §11 boundary table: 'PLAN only (no DRAFT / no SEAL / no BUILD / no fetch): met'
0e3f9d4 §13 enumerates explicit next-step authorization phrases for operator; no execution implied by the plan itself.

l1_epistemic_discount_definition.lesson_source: s12-d1 P11 PARK memo (parallel commit ecbd001), §lessons_learned_for_future_candidates
l1_epistemic_discount_definition.lesson_text_verbatim: Linear-scaling extrapolation from S10-D2's NQ 10y (54 trades) to MNQ 4.6y was 2-3x over-optimistic. Per-instrument signal density does not scale linearly across instruments / windows.
l1_epistemic_discount_definition.discount_rationale: L1 quantifies the over-optimism factor (2-3x) observed when extrapolating signal-density estimates from prior diagnostics. To apply this lesson to any new candidate's K9-reachability estimate, the central estimate is divided by 2 (low-end discount) and by 3 (high-end discount) to bracket the honest expected range. K9 verdicts are evaluated at both the central and the discounted scenarios; the conservative scenario should drive the lifecycle decision.
l1_epistemic_discount_definition.scope: Applies to ANY trades/year estimate that was extrapolated from another instrument, window, mechanic family, or analogous-but-not-identical case.
l1_epistemic_discount_definition.non_scope: Does NOT apply to PURELY EMPIRICAL observations on the exact instrument/window/mechanic being evaluated (e.g., s12-d1 observed 48 trades is empirical, not extrapolated). Calendar-rule estimates (weekly/bi-weekly rebalance counts) have a related but distinct discount: the trade-realization fraction (not every rebalance triggers a contract turnover).

k9_reachability_floors.note: The 50/y OOS floor is approximately 2.3x the 21.74/y IS floor. Any candidate that produces less than 50/y on average across the full diagnostic window is structurally expected to fire OOS K9 regardless of IS outcome.

T1.label: T1_RSI_2_bi_directional_MNQ_c0
T1.estimate_source_note: Estimate sourced from 0e3f9d4 §5.2; **NO citation, NO hand-count, NO published reference provided**. Plausibly grounded in Connors RSI(2) literature for daily-bar mean-reversion on liquid markets (Larry Connors trade rates on S&P 500 stocks typically ~30-50 trades/year long-only), doubled approximately for bi-directional extension, but the transfer from equity stocks to a single futures index has NOT been validated by the plan. Per L1 lesson, single-instrument signal density does not scale linearly from analogous markets. CLASSIFY AS HEURISTIC ESTIMATE pending operator-supplied source or hand-count.

T2.label: T2_multi_instrument_Donchian_15_8_micro_futures_basket
T2.estimate_source_note: Estimate is 4-instrument basket * (10 trades/year per instrument); the 10/y per-instrument figure is the OBSERVED s12-d1 P6 IS result for Donchian-15/8 on MNQ.c.0. The 4x multiplier ASSUMES the other 3 candidate instruments (MES, MYM, M2K) produce signal density similar to MNQ. This cross-instrument assumption is precisely the L1 failure mode (extrapolating density across instruments). Discount applies.

T3_biweekly.label: T3_vol_targeting_MNQ_c0_bi_weekly_rebalance
T3_biweekly.estimate_source_note: Estimate is a CALENDAR rule (52 weeks / 2 = 26 bi-weekly rebalances). Not an extrapolated signal-density estimate. However, not every rebalance produces a contract turnover (if target matches current position, no trade is executed). The 26/y figure is an UPPER BOUND on trade count, not a central estimate. L1 discount is conceptually different here: it represents the fraction of rebalances that actually produce trades, which could plausibly be 50-66% for a slowly-drifting vol regime. Discount applied as such.

T3_weekly.label: T3_alternate_vol_targeting_MNQ_c0_weekly_rebalance
T3_weekly.estimate_source_note: Calendar rule (52 weekly rebalances). Same upper-bound caveat as bi-weekly variant: not every rebalance produces a trade. L1-equivalent discount represents trade-realization fraction.

t1_estimate_source_inquiry.estimate_quoted_from_0e3f9d4: ~50-65 trades/year (long+short bi-directional; daily bars on MNQ)

source_classes_requested_in_order_of_pre.description: Citation to peer-reviewed or vendor-published study of Connors RSI(2) trade rates on daily-bar liquid futures index instruments (MNQ, MES, or analogous equity-index micros). Bi-directional adaptation also cited if applicable.
source_classes_requested_in_order_of_pre.if_provided: Discount factor may be lower (1.5x instead of 2-3x) given external corroboration on similar markets.
source_classes_requested_in_order_of_pre.if_unavailable: Heuristic estimate; full L1 2-3x discount applies.

source_classes_requested_in_order_of_pre.description: Manual hand-count of RSI(2) signals in a representative 12-month slice of the sealed MNQ.c.0 CSV (long signals when RSI(2) < 10, short signals when RSI(2) > 90), under the proposed entry/exit rules. Operator can perform this OFFLINE without authoring code in the controller session; the operator-provided hand-count would be a validated central estimate.
source_classes_requested_in_order_of_pre.if_provided: L1 discount drops to 1.0x (no discount needed since estimate is empirical for the exact instrument + window + mechanic).
source_classes_requested_in_order_of_pre.if_unavailable: Heuristic estimate; full L1 2-3x discount applies.

source_classes_requested_in_order_of_pre.description: Operator (or the plan author) explicitly admits the 50-65/y figure is heuristic without published or empirical anchor.
source_classes_requested_in_order_of_pre.if_admitted: L1 2-3x discount applies. Conservative-discount scenarios are the binding ones for the lifecycle decision.

honest_recommendation_after_l1_discount.t1_status_after_discount: RELATIVELY BEST OF T1/T2/T3 but ABSOLUTELY BORDERLINE. At central estimate (50-65/y), T1 clears OOS K9 borderline-to-clearing. At 2x discount (25-32.5/y), T1 FAILS OOS K9. At 3x discount (16.7-21.7/y), T1 FAILS BOTH IS AND OOS K9. T1 only structurally clears OOS K9 if the 50-65/y estimate is REAL (not heuristic). Source disclosure is load-bearing for the lifecycle decision.
honest_recommendation_after_l1_discount.t2_status_after_discount: FAILS OOS K9 AT CENTRAL ESTIMATE (40/y < 50/y floor). 2x and 3x discount scenarios fail more severely. T2 is structurally K9-OOS-unsafe under any discount.
honest_recommendation_after_l1_discount.t3_biweekly_status_after_discount: FAILS OOS K9 AT CENTRAL ESTIMATE (26/y < 50/y floor). T3 bi-weekly is structurally K9-OOS-unsafe at calendar-rule rate.
honest_recommendation_after_l1_discount.t3_weekly_status_after_discount: CLEARS OOS K9 BORDERLINE AT CENTRAL ESTIMATE (52/y > 50/y floor by 4% margin). Under realization-fraction discount (e.g., 0.7 trade per rebalance), 36.4/y FAILS. T3 weekly is borderline-but-thin and cost-drag elevated.
honest_recommendation_after_l1_discount.summary: Under self-applied L1 discipline, NONE of T1/T2/T3 reliably clears OOS K9 across all tested discount scenarios. T1 is the best of the three in relative terms but the lifecycle outcome depends entirely on whether the 50-65/y estimate is real or heuristic. If heuristic, T1 has a high probability of reproducing the s12-d1 PARK pattern.

rec1_style_disclosure_for_t1_if_pursued.applicability: If T1 (RSI(2) bi-directional on MNQ.c.0) is pursued without independent source/hand-count validation of the 50-65/y estimate, the following REC1-style disclosure SHALL be carried byte-equivalent at SEAL time and propagated through P1 -> P2 -> P3 -> P4 -> P6 -> P11 of the new candidate.
rec1_style_disclosure_for_t1_if_pursued.draft_rec1_for_next_candidate: REC1_T1 (binding): Under L1 epistemic discipline applied to the T1 central estimate (50-65 trades/year heuristic, NOT empirically validated for this exact instrument + window + mechanic), the 2x conservative discount yields 25-32.5 trades/year and the 3x discount yields 16.7-21.7 trades/year. At the 2x discount, OOS K9 (>= 50/y over 2.0y = 100 trades) FIRES; expected OOS verdict is OOS_INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE or PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE. At the 3x discount, IS K9 also fires; expected IS verdict is INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE analogous to s12-d1. The chain shall NOT relax K9 at any phase; the appropriate response to any K9 fire is to seal the INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE / INDETERMINATE verdict and PARK the candidate. Pursuing T1 without independent validation accepts the structural likelihood of an OOS PARK outcome analogous to s12-d1.

alternative_paths_if_t1_falsely_optimist.description: Before authorizing T1 Tier-N spec PLAN, operator hand-counts RSI(2) signals on a representative 1-year slice of sealed MNQ.c.0 CSV. If hand-count confirms 50+/year, L1 discount drops to 1.0x and T1 is safe to pursue. If hand-count yields <50/year, fall back to ALT_B or ALT_D.
alternative_paths_if_t1_falsely_optimist.controller_session_role: READ-ONLY support: operator provides hand-count; controller authors a PLAN-only validation memo documenting the hand-count + revised K9-reachability table. No code execution in this session.

alternative_paths_if_t1_falsely_optimist.description: Search for a mechanic family with structurally higher signal density (>= 100 trades/year on a single instrument daily, or transferable across instruments with low extrapolation risk). Candidates not yet enumerated in 0e3f9d4: (a) Donchian breakout + breakdown + range compound on daily bars; (b) volatility-regime-switching mechanic with daily rebalance + signal layer; (c) statistical-arbitrage on a single instrument's intra-day microstructure WITHOUT requiring fresh fetch (NOT available — would need intraday data); (d) abandon daily-bar paradigm and consider weekly bars (which would HALVE both K9 floors but also halve trade rates — neutral).
alternative_paths_if_t1_falsely_optimist.data_fetch_risk: MEDIUM-HIGH for some sub-options (intraday data not in sealed CSV).

alternative_paths_if_t1_falsely_optimist.description: Authorize the T4 universe-pivot path enumerated in 0e3f9d4 §8 (crypto MBT / Treasury ZN / energy CL). Highest data scope friction; requires fresh Databento fetch + availability probe + audit lifecycle BEFORE any Tier-N spec PLAN.

Per 0e3f9d4 §9 (T5), pause the trading-bot track entirely. Acknowledges that multiple recent Phase-2 candidates (s7-D1, s9, B006_001/002, s10-d1, s10-D2, s11-d1, s12-d1) have all parked without producing a money-proven candidate; the structural pattern suggests the current Phase-2 framework + daily-bar constraint + single-instrument scope may be fundamentally incompatible with K9 OOS >= 100. Honest acknowledgement: a pause for reflection may be warranted before burning more sealed-artifact authoring effort.
alternative_paths_if_t1_falsely_optimist.cost: Zero new sealed-artifact cost. Forgone option value: no forward research motion.

alternative_paths_if_t1_falsely_optimist.description: Relaxing K9 from 100 closed trades or extending the OOS window beyond the audit-clean MNQ CSV coverage (2024-01-02 to 2025-12-30 = 2.0y) is EXPLICITLY NOT AUTHORIZED by this memo. K9 is INVIOLATE per the Tier-N spec invariants carried across the chain. Extending OOS requires fresh data which requires fresh fetch which is out of scope.

halt_option_explicit_for_higher_density_.operator_phrase_to_search_higher_density: Authorize alternative selection plan rev2 only [scope: enumerate higher-density mechanic families that structurally clear OOS K9 >= 50/y without fresh data fetch]
halt_option_explicit_for_higher_density_.halt_rationale_per_pattern_recognition: Eight consecutive Phase-2 candidates (s7-D1, s9, B006_001, B006_002, s10-d1, s10-D2, s11-d1, s12-d1) have parked. The structural common denominator is daily-bar resolution + single-instrument-or-small-basket + K9=100 OOS floor. Under L1 discipline applied retroactively, the K9 OOS floor of 50 trades/year is structurally hard to clear with daily-bar single-instrument mechanics. A halt for reflection or a fundamental framework revisit (intraday data acquisition, K9 threshold review, multi-instrument expansion strategy) may produce more research value than another T1-style attempt.

final_recommendation.primary: DO NOT authorize T1 Tier-N spec PLAN until the T1 50-65/y estimate is validated by hand-count or published citation (ALT_A). The cost of operator-side hand-count is low; the cost of authoring a full Tier-N spec lifecycle for a candidate that ends in another PARK is high.
final_recommendation.secondary: If hand-count is not feasible operator-side, authorize ALT_B (search for higher-density mechanic) or ALT_D (halt). Both preserve sealed-artifact discipline and avoid repeating the s12-d1 PARK pattern.
final_recommendation.tertiary: If operator wishes to proceed with T1 despite heuristic estimate, authorize T1 Tier-N spec PLAN ONLY with the REC1_T1 disclosure (drafted above) carried byte-equivalent through the chain. This formalizes the expected likelihood of PARK and prevents lessons-learned regression at P11 time.
not_recommended: Authorize T1 Tier-N spec PLAN without source disclosure or REC1_T1
Authorize T2 (K9 OOS fails at central)
Authorize T3 bi-weekly (K9 OOS fails at central)
Authorize T4 without first establishing K9-reachability estimate for the chosen universe (insufficient information at PLAN time)

parallel_seal_b_chain.note: This memo does NOT use the SEAL-B chain as a source for any K9-reachability estimate, recommendation, or lifecycle decision.

seal_method: LESSON_HUNTER_004 canonical roundtrip (json.dumps sort_keys=True separators=',:' ensure_ascii=False default=str EXCLUDING report_seal_sha256 + seal_method)
